Title: Semantic Evolution over Populations for LLM-Guided Automated Program Repair
Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown strong potential for automated program repair (APR), particularly through iterative refinement that generates and improves candidate patches. However, state-of-the-art iterative refinement LLM-based APR approaches cannot fully address challenges, including maintaining useful diversity among repair hypotheses, identifying semantically related repair families, composing complementary partial fixes, exploiting structured failure information, and esca
